answers.answer: B) Run the container interactively with docker run -it <image> /bin/sh to inspect the environment and run the entrypoint manually. This lets you see the actual environment, manually run the entrypoint command to see errors, and check file permissions, missing files, environment variables. Other options won't help debug the issue.

JQ COMMANDS:

1. Count events by type: jq 'group_by(.event) | map({event: .[0].event, count: length}) | sort_by(-.count)' events.json

2. Top 10 users by duration: jq 'group_by(.user_id) | map({user_id: .[0].user_id, total: map(.properties.duration_ms // 0) | add}) | sort_by(-.total) | .[0:10]' events.json

3. Avg duration per page (mobile): jq '[.[] | select(.properties.device=="mobile")] | group_by(.properties.page) | map({page: .[0].properties.page, avg: (map(.properties.duration_ms) | add / length)})' events.json

4. Sessions with >5 pages: jq 'group_by(.session_id) | map({session: .[0].session_id, count: length}) | map(select(.count > 5))' events.json

5. Funnel: jq 'group_by(.user_id) | map({products: (map(.properties.page)|any(.=="/products")), cart: (map(.properties.page)|any(.=="/cart")), checkout: (map(.properties.page)|any(.=="/checkout"))}) | {to_cart: ([.[]|select(.products and .cart)]|length)/([.[]|select(.products)]|length)*100, to_checkout: ([.[]|select(.products and .cart and .checkout)]|length)/([.[]|select(.products and .cart)]|length)*100}' events.json

6. Busiest hour: jq 'map(.timestamp|split("T")[1]|split(":")[0]) | group_by(.) | map({hour: .[0], count: length}) | sort_by(-.count) | .[0]' events.json

7. Bot detection: jq 'group_by(.user_id) | map({user: .[0].user_id, max: (group_by(.timestamp[0:16]) | map(length) | max)}) | map(select(.max > 100))' events.json

8. CSV: jq -r 'group_by(.user_id) | map([.[0].user_id, length, ([.[].properties.page]|unique|length), (map(.properties.duration_ms//0)|add/length)]) | ["user_id,total_events,unique_pages,avg_duration"], (.[]|join(","))' events.json
